SEARCH
Package com.example.abacus_app

Class ProfileViewModel

java.lang.Object
androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
com.example.abacus_app.ProfileViewModel
public class ProfileViewModel extends androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
ProfileViewModel Holds all business logic and state for the profile screen. Sits between ProfileFragment and UserRepository so the fragment never touches data directly. Ref: US 01.02.01–04

    void
    init(UserRepository repository, boolean isGuest)
    Initializes the ViewModel with a UserRepository and guest status.
    void
    loadProfile()
    Loads the user profile from Firestore and pushes values into LiveData.
    void
    logout()
    Clears the local UUID and signs out of Firebase Auth, then resets all profile state to guest so the profile screen shows the guest UI in-place without navigating away.
    void
    saveProfile()
    Validates inputs then saves name, email, phone, and notificationsEnabled to Firestore.
    void
    setEmail(String email)
    Sets the user email.
    void
    setName(String name)
    Sets the user name.
    void
    setNotificationsEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Sets the notifications enabled state.
    void
    setPhone(String phone)
    Sets the user phone number.
    void
    setRole(String role)
    Sets the user role.

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<Boolean> getProfileDeleted()

    • init

      public void init(UserRepository repository, boolean isGuest)
      Initializes the ViewModel with a UserRepository and guest status.
      Parameters:
      repository - UserRepository instance
      isGuest - boolean indicating if the user is a guest

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the user name.
      Parameters:
      name - String containing the user's name

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the user email.
      Parameters:
      email - String containing the user's email

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Sets the user phone number.
      Parameters:
      phone - String containing the user's phone number

    • setRole

      public void setRole(String role)
      Sets the user role.
      Parameters:
      role - String containing the user's role

    • setNotificationsEnabled

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Sets the notifications enabled state.
      Parameters:
      enabled - Boolean indicating whether notifications are enabled

    • loadProfile

      public void loadProfile()
      Loads the user profile from Firestore and pushes values into LiveData. Called by the fragment in onViewCreated().

    • saveProfile

      public void saveProfile()
      Validates inputs then saves name, email, phone, and notificationsEnabled to Firestore. Role is intentionally excluded — it can only be changed via Firestore console or by an admin, never by the user editing their own profile.

    • deleteProfile

      public void deleteProfile()
      Soft-deletes the profile via the repository. Fragment should call this only after the user confirms via AlertDialog.

    • logout

      public void logout()
      Clears the local UUID and signs out of Firebase Auth, then resets all profile state to guest so the profile screen shows the guest UI in-place without navigating away.

    • clearToast

      public void clearToast()
